mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_category(name, description, parent_id, sort_order) VALUES(#{name}, #{description}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material_category WHERE id=#{id} AND status=1

SELECT * FROM material_category
status=1
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND parent_id = #{parentId}
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order, id
